'''Fa-Loh-Sui''' was a [[Tiss'shar]] [[Assassin/Legends|assassin]]. Beautiful and deadly, she caught the eye of [[Abin-Ral-Xufush]], who courted her for a time. He would later name his [[Fa-Loh-Sui (corvette)|flagship]] after her.
